title: crotalaria verrucosa
intro: Crotalaria verrucosa, also known as the rough-seeded rattlebox or warty rattlebox, is a plant species in the legume family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to aid in digestion. Crotalaria verrucosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, or powder, which are often used in traditional medicine practices.
